requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Low Voltage Directive and Harmonised Standard EN 62368-1
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——低压指令与协调标准 EN 62368-1
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——低壓指令與協調標準 EN 62368-1

summary.en: Finished consumer power supplies (GaN fast chargers, USB-C power adapters) placed on the EU market must comply with the legally binding Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU (LVD). Harmonised standards are voluntary: applying a cited standard gives presumption of conformity with corresponding LVD essential requirements, but manufacturers may use other technical solutions if the technical file demonstrates conformity. EN 62368-1:2014 (2nd edition) is cited in the EU Official Journal (OJEU) for LVD and can confer presumption of conformity. Note: EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2020 (3rd edition) exists and is technically newer, but if it is not cited for the relevant requirement it does not itself confer OJEU presumption of conformity under LVD. Manufacturers must carry out a conformity assessment, compile a technical file, issue an EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC), and affix the CE marking before placing the product on the market. No third-party Notified Body is generally required for LVD self-assessment, but the DoC and technical file must be held for 10 years.
summary.zh: 在欧盟市场销售的消费类成品电源（氮化镓快充、USB-C电源适配器）须符合具有法律约束力的低压指令2014/35/EU（LVD）。协调标准为自愿采用：采用已在欧盟官方公报（OJEU）引用的标准，可就相应LVD基本要求获得合规推定；制造商也可采用其他技术方案，但须在技术文件中证明符合要求。EN 62368-1:2014（第2版）已在LVD项下被OJEU引用，可赋予合规推定效力。注意：EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2020（第3版）虽已存在且技术上更新，但如未就相关要求被引用，则其本身不赋予LVD项下的OJEU合规推定效力。制造商须完成符合性评估、建立技术文件、签发欧盟符合性声明（DoC）并在产品上市前粘贴CE标志。LVD通常可由制造商自行评估，无需第三方公告机构参与，但DoC及技术文件须保存10年。
summary.zht: 在歐盟市場銷售的消費類成品電源（氮化鎵快充、USB-C電源適配器）須符合具有法律約束力的低壓指令2014/35/EU（LVD）。協調標準為自願採用：採用已在歐盟官方公報（OJEU）引用的標準，可就相應LVD基本要求獲得合規推定；製造商也可採用其他技術方案，但須在技術文件中證明符合要求。EN 62368-1:2014（第2版）已在LVD項下被OJEU引用，可賦予合規推定效力。注意：EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2020（第3版）雖已存在且技術上更新，但如未就相關要求被引用，則其本身不賦予LVD項下的OJEU合規推定效力。製造商須完成符合性評估、建立技術文件、簽發歐盟符合性聲明（DoC）並於產品上市前貼附CE標誌。LVD通常可由製造商自行評估，無需第三方公告機構參與，但DoC及技術文件須保存10年。

standards_or_laws: EN 62368-1:2014 (harmonised under LVD 2014/35/EU — 2nd edition; currently cited in OJEU)

summary.en: In China, power adapters and chargers are subject to mandatory CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under the 3C catalogue administered by SAMR/CNCA. The applicable safety standard is GB 4943.1-2022, which is technically based on IEC 62368-1:2018 (not IEC 62368-1:2020) with additional national differences (stricter overcurrent protection, isolation requirements, high-temperature/humidity insulation provisions). It replaced GB 4943.1-2011 (based on IEC 60950-1) and GB 8898-2011. Implementation: new CCC applications required from 1 August 2023; existing certificates to be updated by 31 July 2024. CCC requires testing and factory inspection by a CNCA-designated certification body; the manufacturer receives a CCC certificate and may then affix the CCC mark.
summary.zh: 在中国，电源适配器和充电器须依据市场监管总局/国家认监委管理的强制性产品认证目录，取得 CCC（中国强制认证）。适用安全标准为 GB 4943.1-2022，其技术基础为 IEC 62368-1:2018（非 IEC 62368-1:2020），并附有国家差异（更严格的过流保护、隔离要求及高温高湿绝缘规定）。该标准取代了 GB 4943.1-2011（基于 IEC 60950-1）和 GB 8898-2011。实施要求：新 CCC 申请自 2023 年 8 月 1 日起须采用新标准，现有证书须于 2024 年 7 月 31 日前完成更新。CCC 须由 CNCA 指定的认证机构进行测试和工厂检查，制造商取得 CCC 证书后方可粘贴 CCC 标志。
summary.zht: 在中國，電源適配器和充電器須依據市場監管總局/國家認監委管理的強制性產品認證目錄，取得 CCC（中國強制認證）。適用安全標準為 GB 4943.1-2022，其技術基礎為 IEC 62368-1:2018（非 IEC 62368-1:2020），並附有國家差異（更嚴格的過流保護、隔離要求及高溫高濕絕緣規定）。該標準取代了 GB 4943.1-2011（基於 IEC 60950-1）和 GB 8898-2011。實施要求：新 CCC 申請自 2023 年 8 月 1 日起須採用新標準，現有證書須於 2024 年 7 月 31 日前完成更新。CCC 須由 CNCA 指定的認證機構進行測試和工廠檢查，製造商取得 CCC 證書後方可貼附 CCC 標誌。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1-2022 (based on IEC 62368-1:2018 with national deviations; mandatory; replaces GB 4943.1-2011 and GB 8898-2011)

gap.en: Although GB 4943.1-2022 (based on IEC 62368-1:2018) and EN 62368-1:2014 share a common IEC lineage, CCC certification and Chinese test reports are NOT accepted as proof of EU conformity. EU LVD compliance requires demonstrating conformity with the LVD essential requirements, usually by applying the OJEU-cited harmonised standard EN 62368-1:2014 to obtain presumption of conformity, or by using another documented technical route. The conformity route, documentation language, and regulatory framework are entirely separate. Exporters must prepare EU-recognised evidence and issue a fresh DoC even when CCC has already been obtained.
gap.zh: 尽管GB 4943.1-2022（基于IEC 62368-1:2018）与EN 62368-1:2014同源于IEC技术体系，CCC认证及中国检测报告不被视为欧盟合规证明。欧盟LVD合规要求证明产品符合LVD基本要求，通常通过采用OJEU引用的协调标准EN 62368-1:2014取得合规推定，也可采用其他有文件支持的技术路径。合规路径、文件语言及监管框架完全独立。出口商即使已取得CCC认证，仍须准备欧盟认可的合规证据，并签发全新的符合性声明。
gap.zht: 儘管GB 4943.1-2022（基於IEC 62368-1:2018）與EN 62368-1:2014同源於IEC技術體系，CCC認證及中國檢測報告不被視為歐盟合規證明。歐盟LVD合規要求證明產品符合LVD基本要求，通常通過採用OJEU引用的協調標準EN 62368-1:2014取得合規推定，也可採用其他有文件支持的技術路徑。合規路徑、文件語言及監管框架完全獨立。出口商即使已取得CCC認證，仍須準備歐盟認可的合規證據，並簽發全新的符合性聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation — compliance with LVD 2014/35/EU, EU DoC and CE marking are required for EU market access. EN 62368-1:2014 is a voluntary harmonised standard that can give presumption of conformity; it is not the mandatory legal obligation itself.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC required for power adapters/chargers sold in China under CNCA catalogue

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Products exported from China to the EU must meet LVD 2014/35/EU, issue an EU DoC and affix CE marking regardless of existing CCC status. EN 62368-1:2014 is a common voluntary harmonised-standard route to presumption of conformity, but alternative technical evidence may be used if it demonstrates compliance with LVD essential requirements. CCC and CE are parallel regimes with no mutual recognition. Both regimes must be addressed for products sold in both markets.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 从中国出口至欧盟的产品须符合LVD 2014/35/EU、签发欧盟符合性声明并贴附CE标志，与是否持有CCC无关。EN 62368-1:2014是常用的自愿协调标准路径，可取得合规推定；但如能证明符合LVD基本要求，也可采用其他技术证据。CCC与CE为并行制度，不存在相互认可。在两地市场销售的产品须同时处理两套要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 從中國出口至歐盟的產品須符合LVD 2014/35/EU、簽發歐盟符合性聲明並貼附CE標誌，與是否持有CCC無關。EN 62368-1:2014是常用的自願協調標準路徑，可取得合規推定；但如能證明符合LVD基本要求，也可採用其他技術證據。CCC與CE為並行制度，不存在相互認可。在兩地市場銷售的產品須同時處理兩套要求。

requirement_topic.en: CE Marking and EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC) for Power Supplies
requirement_topic.zh: 电源产品 CE 标志与欧盟符合性声明（DoC）
requirement_topic.zht: 電源產品 CE 標誌與歐盟符合性聲明（DoC）

summary.en: Under LVD 2014/35/EU, the manufacturer (or their EU authorised representative) must draw up an EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC) before affixing CE marking. The DoC must identify the product and list the applicable EU directives and regulations. Where harmonised standards such as EN 62368-1, EMC standards, or RoHS-related standards are applied, they may be listed as the voluntary technical basis supporting presumption of conformity; if alternative specifications are used, the technical file must justify conformity another way. The CE mark must be affixed visibly, legibly, and indelibly on the product or its packaging. An EU-based economic operator (manufacturer, importer, or authorised representative) must be identifiable on the product label. The technical file must be retained for 10 years and made available to market surveillance authorities on request.
summary.zh: 依据低压指令2014/35/EU，制造商（或其欧盟授权代表）须在粘贴CE标志前签署欧盟符合性声明（DoC）。DoC须注明产品信息，并列出适用的欧盟指令和法规。若采用EN 62368-1、EMC标准或RoHS相关标准等协调标准，可在DoC中作为支持合规推定的自愿技术依据列明；如采用其他规范，则须在技术文件中以其他方式论证合规。CE标志须以清晰、易读、不可擦除的方式标注于产品或其包装上。产品标签须注明欧盟境内经济运营者（制造商、进口商或授权代表）的信息。技术文件须保存10年，并在市场监管机构要求时提供。
summary.zht: 依據低壓指令2014/35/EU，製造商（或其歐盟授權代表）須於貼附CE標誌前簽署歐盟符合性聲明（DoC）。DoC須載明產品資訊，並列出適用的歐盟指令和法規。若採用EN 62368-1、EMC標準或RoHS相關標準等協調標準，可在DoC中作為支持合規推定的自願技術依據列明；如採用其他規範，則須在技術文件中以其他方式論證合規。CE標誌須以清晰、易讀、不可擦除的方式標注於產品或其包裝上。產品標籤須載明歐盟境內經濟運營者（製造商、進口商或授權代表）的資訊。技術文件須保存10年，並在市場監管機構要求時提供。

standards_or_laws: Decision No 768/2008/EC (NLF modules — self-declaration Module A)

summary.en: Under the CCC regime, Chinese manufacturers do not issue a self-declaration; instead, a CNCA-designated certification body issues the CCC certificate following product testing and factory inspection. The CCC mark is then applied to the product. There is no concept of a manufacturer-signed DoC under CCC. Factory inspection (initial and annual surveillance) is required to maintain the certificate.
summary.zh: 在 CCC 体系下，中国制造商不签发自我声明；而是由 CNCA 指定的认证机构在完成产品测试和工厂检查后颁发 CCC 证书。制造商随后在产品上标注 CCC 标志。CCC 体系中没有制造商签署的符合性声明概念。证书的持续有效需经工厂初次检查及年度监督检查。
summary.zht: 在 CCC 體系下，中國製造商不簽發自我聲明；而是由 CNCA 指定的認證機構在完成產品測試和工廠檢查後頒發 CCC 證書。製造商隨後在產品上標注 CCC 標誌。CCC 體系中沒有製造商簽署的符合性聲明概念。證書的持續有效需經工廠初次檢查及年度監督檢查。

standards_or_laws: Regulations on Compulsory Product Certification (State Council Order No. 117, as amended)
CNCA-C08-01 Implementation Rules for Compulsory Product Certification — Information Technology Equipment

gap.en: The EU CE/DoC self-declaration model (manufacturer asserts conformity, keeps technical file, no mandatory third-party) contrasts sharply with China's CCC third-party certification model (mandatory accredited body testing and factory inspection, body issues certificate). Chinese exporters accustomed to CCC must understand that for the EU: (1) they or their EU authorised representative must sign the DoC themselves; (2) an EU-registered economic operator contact must appear on the label; (3) no EU authority pre-approves the product — but market surveillance authorities can and do audit. Failure to have a valid DoC and CE mark is grounds for border rejection or market withdrawal across all 27 EU member states.
gap.zh: 欧盟 CE/DoC 自我声明模式（制造商自行声明合规，保存技术文件，无需强制第三方参与）与中国 CCC 第三方认证模式（强制要求认可机构测试和工厂检查，由认证机构颁发证书）存在本质区别。习惯 CCC 流程的中国出口商须了解：在欧盟，(1) 须由其本人或欧盟授权代表自行签署 DoC；(2) 标签上须标注欧盟注册经济运营者的联系方式；(3) 欧盟当局不预先审批产品，但市场监管机构可随时开展审计。未持有有效 DoC 和 CE 标志将导致产品在全部 27 个欧盟成员国遭拒于边境或被撤出市场。
gap.zht: 歐盟 CE/DoC 自我聲明模式（製造商自行聲明合規，保存技術文件，無需強制第三方參與）與中國 CCC 第三方認證模式（強制要求認可機構測試和工廠檢查，由認證機構頒發證書）存在本質區別。習慣 CCC 流程的中國出口商須了解：在歐盟，(1) 須由其本人或歐盟授權代表自行簽署 DoC；(2) 標籤上須載明歐盟註冊經濟運營者的聯繫方式；(3) 歐盟當局不預先審批產品，但市場監管機構可隨時開展審計。未持有有效 DoC 和 CE 標誌將導致產品在全部 27 個歐盟成員國遭拒於邊境或被撤出市場。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation — EU DoC, technical file, CE marking and EU economic-operator identification are required where applicable. Listed harmonised standards are voluntary technical routes to presumption of conformity, not mandatory standards.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certificate and mark required; third-party body certification is compulsory (no self-declaration option)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese exporters of GaN chargers and USB-C power adapters must issue an EU Declaration of Conformity and affix CE marking under applicable EU legislation before placing products on the EU market. Holding a CCC certificate does not substitute for the EU DoC process. Harmonised standards may be cited voluntarily to support presumption of conformity, while the mandatory duties remain the EU legal acts, technical documentation and CE/DoC obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 氮化镓充电器和USB-C电源适配器的中国出口商在产品投放欧盟市场前，须依据适用欧盟法规签署欧盟符合性声明并粘贴CE标志。持有CCC证书不能替代欧盟DoC流程。协调标准可自愿引用以支持合规推定；强制性义务仍来自欧盟法律文件、技术文件以及CE/DoC要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 氮化鎵充電器和USB-C電源適配器的中國出口商在產品投放歐盟市場前，須依據適用歐盟法規簽署歐盟符合性聲明並貼附CE標誌。持有CCC證書不能替代歐盟DoC流程。協調標準可自願引用以支持合規推定；強制性義務仍來自歐盟法律文件、技術文件以及CE/DoC要求。
